description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and metallic accents. The body is angular and streamlined, with a prominent detachable box magazine extending below the receiver. The barrel is relatively short and capped with a simple muzzle device, while the top of the rifle is equipped with a Picatinny rail and flip-up iron sights for mounting optics or accessories. The stock is fixed and integrated into the rear of the weapon, providing a sturdy shoulder rest. The grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is pronounced, suggesting ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, short barrel, detachable box magazine, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, muzzle device, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fixed stock, detachable box magazine, Picatinny rail, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the slim width of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the grip and magazine.
